# transport-bar

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata toolbar transport: play/pause button and a Synthesia-style speed stepper ([тИТ xx% +]) with live BPM. Contributes to Sonata.Toolbar.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Toolbar` "playback" тЖТ `PlaybackControls`
  - Uses: `apps/sonata/shell.Sonata`, `apps/sonata/shell.useCursorSelector`, `apps/sonata/shell.useSonata`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/text.Text`, `primitives/ui-kit.cn`
